debug_info.goal:
s : Set ℝ
h : NullMeasurableSet s volume
⊢ ∃ t ⊆ s, MeasurableSet t ∧ volume t = volume s ∧ volume (s \ t) = 0

proof:
obtain ⟨t, hst, hmt, heq⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  exact ⟨t, hst, hmt, measure_congr heq, ae_le_set.mp heq.symm.le⟩
failed_attempts:
rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, heq.measure_eq.symm, ae_le_set.mp heq.le⟩

obtain ⟨t, hts, htm, hteq⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, measure_congr hteq, ae_le_set.mp hteq.symm.le⟩

end example2

rcases h.exists_measurable_subset with ⟨t, hst, htm, hz⟩
  exact ⟨t, hst, htm, measure_eq_measure_of_null_diff hst hz, hz⟩

obtain ⟨t, t_sub_s, t_m, t_eq_s⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  exact ⟨t, t_sub_s, t_m, measure_congr t_eq_s, ae_le_set.mp t_eq_s.symm.le⟩

end example2

rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, heq.measure_eq.symm, ae_le_set.mp heq.le⟩

obtain ⟨t, hts, htm, heq⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  exact ⟨t, hts, htm, heq.measure_eq.symm, heq.measure_diff_null⟩

obtain ⟨t, hst, htm, heq⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  exact ⟨t, hst, htm, measure_congr heq, ae_le_set.1 heq.symm.le⟩

end example2
exact h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq.imp fun _ ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩ ↦ ⟨h1, h2, h3.measure_eq, h3.symm.le⟩

let ⟨t, hts, htm, hteq⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  ⟨t, hts, htm, hteq.measure_eq, ae_le_set.mp hteq.symm.le⟩

rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hst, htm, h_eq⟩
  exact ⟨t, hst, htm, h_eq.measure_eq.symm, measure_diff_null h_eq⟩

obtain ⟨t, hst, htm, heq⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  exact ⟨t, hst, htm, heq.measure_eq, ae_le_set.mp heq.symm.le⟩

end example2
